// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.bare;

// Bare call to a name this file neither declares nor statically imports: no
// origin can be established at all, so the catch swallows.
class Tier2BareNoDefinition {
    void bareUndeclaredSwallows() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            logInternal(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
